proposed_relations.description: M15 bus speed on First/Second Avenue corridor in 1996

evidence_refs.source_quote: A bar chart illustrating the trend of bus speeds on the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS route. The vertical axis is labeled 'Average Speed (MPH)' and ranges from 5 to 10. The horizontal axis shows the years 1996, 2002, and 2006. Three blue bars represent the average speeds for each year: 9.1 MPH in 1996, 8.4 MPH in 2002, and 8.1 MPH in 2006.
